texto: The physicist had no time to waste on a symbol
autor: his concern was with what the symbol denoted. To the typesetter the symbol and its denotation were bound in an organic unity. There was a meaning to the symbol itself which only the typesetter could appreciate.
explicacao: Citação de his concern was with what the symbol denoted. To the typesetter the symbol and its denotation were bound in an organic unity. There was a meaning to the symbol itself which only the typesetter could appreciate. sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “The physicist had no time to waste on a symbol” articula reflexao, k-sridhar, physicist em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
